PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana.benefit: Rs 6000 per year in three installments of Rs 2000 each
PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land up to 2 hectares
PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana.how_to_apply: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest Common Service Centre
PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana.documents: Aadhaar card, land records, bank account details

Karnataka Raitha Siri Scheme.benefit: Rs 2000 per acre per season, maximum Rs 10000 per year
Karnataka Raitha Siri Scheme.eligibility: Farmers who own land in Karnataka and are registered with the agriculture department
Karnataka Raitha Siri Scheme.how_to_apply: Visit nearest Raitha Samparka Kendra or apply online at karnataka.gov.in
Karnataka Raitha Siri Scheme.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, bank passbook

PM Fasal Bima Yojana.benefit: Crop insurance against losses due to natural calamities with low premium rates
PM Fasal Bima Yojana.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
PM Fasal Bima Yojana.how_to_apply: Contact nearest bank or insurance company before sowing season
PM Fasal Bima Yojana.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, bank account, sowing certificate

Pradhan Mantri Kisan Credit Card.benefit: Credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 7% interest per year, effective 4% with prompt repayment
Pradhan Mantri Kisan Credit Card.eligibility: All farmers including tenant farmers and sharecroppers
Pradhan Mantri Kisan Credit Card.how_to_apply: Visit nearest bank branch with land records
Pradhan Mantri Kisan Credit Card.documents: Aadhaar card, land records, passport photo, bank account

Karnataka Krishi Yantra Dhare Scheme.benefit: Subsidized rental access to tractors, tillers and harvesters
Karnataka Krishi Yantra Dhare Scheme.eligibility: Small farmers with less than 2 hectares of land in Karnataka
Karnataka Krishi Yantra Dhare Scheme.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, farmer ID

PM Kisan Tractor Subsidy Scheme.benefit: 20% to 50% subsidy on new tractor purchase, up to Rs 1.5 lakh
PM Kisan Tractor Subsidy Scheme.eligibility: Farmers with land holding up to 5 acres who do not already own a tractor
PM Kisan Tractor Subsidy Scheme.how_to_apply: Apply through state agriculture department or dealer
PM Kisan Tractor Subsidy Scheme.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, bank account, quotation from dealer

Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY).benefit: Funding for farm infrastructure, storage and processing units
Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY).eligibility: Farmers and farmer groups in all states
Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY).documents: Land records, project proposal, bank account

Karnataka Bhagyalakshmi Scheme.benefit: Rs 10000 fixed deposit at birth, maturing to Rs 1 lakh at age 18
Karnataka Bhagyalakshmi Scheme.eligibility: BPL families in Karnataka with a girl child born after April 2006
Karnataka Bhagyalakshmi Scheme.how_to_apply: Apply at nearest Anganwadi center within one year of birth
Karnataka Bhagyalakshmi Scheme.documents: Birth certificate, BPL card, Aadhaar card, bank account

Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Gramin.benefit: Housing assistance of Rs 1.2 lakh in plain areas and Rs 1.3 lakh in hilly areas
Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Gramin.eligibility: Homeless families and families living in kutcha houses in rural areas
Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Gramin.how_to_apply: Apply through Gram Panchayat or visit pmayg.nic.in
Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Gramin.documents: Aadhaar card, bank account, BPL certificate

Soil Health Card Scheme.benefit: Free soil testing and fertilizer recommendations
Soil Health Card Scheme.how_to_apply: Contact nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra or agriculture department

National Food Security Mission.benefit: Subsidized seeds, fertilizers and farmer training
National Food Security Mission.eligibility: Farmers in identified districts across India

Karnataka Organic Farming Scheme.benefit: Rs 10000 per hectare per year for conversion to organic farming
Karnataka Organic Farming Scheme.eligibility: Farmers willing to adopt organic farming for at least 3 years
Karnataka Organic Farming Scheme.how_to_apply: Register at nearest Raitha Samparka Kendra
Karnataka Organic Farming Scheme.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, commitment letter

PM Kusum Scheme.benefit: 90% subsidy on solar pumps for irrigation
PM Kusum Scheme.eligibility: All farmers with agricultural land and water source
PM Kusum Scheme.how_to_apply: Apply through state nodal agency or DISCOM
PM Kusum Scheme.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, water source proof

Kisan Vikas Patra.documents: Aadhaar card, PAN card for investments above Rs 50000

Karnataka Sericulture Scheme.benefit: Subsidy up to Rs 30000 per hectare for mulberry plantation
Karnataka Sericulture Scheme.eligibility: Farmers in Karnataka interested in silk farming
Karnataka Sericulture Scheme.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, bank account

National Horticulture Mission.benefit: Subsidies on drip irrigation, poly houses and cold storage
National Horticulture Mission.documents: Land records, project proposal, bank account

Karnataka Drought Relief Scheme.benefit: Rs 6800 per hectare for irrigated crops and Rs 3400 per hectare for dryland crops
Karnataka Drought Relief Scheme.eligibility: Farmers in drought-declared taluks in Karnataka
Karnataka Drought Relief Scheme.how_to_apply: Apply through village accountant or Gram Panchayat
Karnataka Drought Relief Scheme.documents: Land records, crop loss certificate, Aadhaar card, bank account

Pradhan Mantri Micro Food Processing Sch.benefit: 35% credit-linked subsidy up to Rs 10 lakh
Pradhan Mantri Micro Food Processing Sch.eligibility: Individual farmers and farmer groups wanting to process farm produce
Pradhan Mantri Micro Food Processing Sch.how_to_apply: Apply through state nodal agency or visit mofpi.gov.in
Pradhan Mantri Micro Food Processing Sch.documents: Land records, project report, bank account, Aadhaar card

E-NAM National Agriculture Market.benefit: Direct online access to buyers and better crop prices
E-NAM National Agriculture Market.eligibility: All farmers registered with their APMC
E-NAM National Agriculture Market.how_to_apply: Register at enam.gov.in or nearest APMC office
E-NAM National Agriculture Market.documents: Aadhaar card, bank account, APMC registration

Karnataka Raitha Bandhu Scheme.benefit: Zero-interest crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh
Karnataka Raitha Bandhu Scheme.eligibility: Farmers with land records in Karnataka registered with cooperative banks
Karnataka Raitha Bandhu Scheme.how_to_apply: Visit nearest District Cooperative Central Bank
Karnataka Raitha Bandhu Scheme.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, bank passbook, farmer ID card
